notes: Schema audit + workflow gap review for YLO v2. Claude made unauthorised edits early (7 Edits before explicit instruction). Key findings: configure step has no output schema and is effectively broken; video_cta deprecated; createChapters from SRT never worked; content analysis needs 12-parallel redesign; title/thumbnail outputs return freeform text where JSON is required; brandConfig variables unresolved — FliHub publish proposed as the injection mechanism. Session spans two days with long idle gaps; actual working time ~2-3 hours.
